title: The Invisible Man - Curriculum Unit Card 👁️

notes: Needs journals, questions added before this card can generate complete daily lessons.

book.title: The Invisible Man - Curriculum Unit Card 👁️
book.description: Grade Level: 8th Grade (adaptable to 7th-9th) Duration: 15 days (12 reading days + 3 assessments) Genre: Science Fiction / Psychological Thriller Theme: Power, Isolation, Consequences of Ambition Curriculum Days: 31-45 (Quarter 1, Weeks 7-9)

weeks.title: Week 7 (Days 31-34: 12 words)
vocabulary: 1. experiment (n.) - a scientific procedure to test a hypothesis
7. isolation (n.) - the state of being separated from others
10. disguise (n.) - a means of altering one's appearance to conceal identity

weeks.title: Week 8 (Days 36-39: 12 words)
vocabulary: 13. accomplice (n.) - a person who helps another commit a crime
16. madness (n.) - the state of having a serious mental illness
19. betrayal (n.) - the action of being disloyal to someone
22. revelation (n.) - a surprising disclosure of previously unknown information

weeks.title: Week 9 (Days 41-44: 12 words)
vocabulary: 25. pursuit (n.) - the action of following or chasing someone
28. consequence (n.) - a result or effect of an action or condition
31. mortality (n.) - the state of being subject to death
34. ambition (n.) - a strong desire to achieve something
